The '''ZD-9000''' was a model of [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] produced on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the last years of the Empire. It measured 500 meters in length, and could accommodate 2,200 passengers and 20,000 metric tons of cargo. The ship's crew included 350 officers and deckhands.

{{Ship-stub}}
